heading: Filing preliminary survey, map and profile of road
label: 942–4 Filing preliminary survey, map and profile of road
text: Any company mentioned in sections 687a, 687a–2 to 687a–5, and 942–1 to 942–9 of this title and sections 607a and 615a of title 16, by filing with the Secretary of the Interior a preliminary actual survey and plat of its proposed route, shall have the right at any time within one year thereafter to file the map and profile of definite location and such preliminary survey and plat shall during the said period of one year from the time of filing the same have the effect to render all the lands on which said preliminary survey and plat shall pass subject to the right of way mentioned in .1section 942–3 of this titleSee References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSections 687a and 687a–2 to 687a–5 of this title, referred to in text, were repealed by , §§ 703(a), 704(a), , , 2792.Pub. L. 94–579, title VII90 Stat. 2789Oct. 21, 1976
